AUTOMATION TUTORIALS INCLUDED:

1. Multi-Region Lead Routing Engine
- Full step-by-step tutorial with HubSpot workflow setup
- Region-specific email sequences timing
- Expected ROI: 20-30% faster response, 15% higher conversion

2. CRM Hygiene Automation Suite
- Duplicate detection, data completeness scoring
- Stale record detection, field validation
- Expected ROI: 50% fewer duplicates, 30% more complete data

3. Cross-Region Forecasting Dashboard
- Custom properties setup, dashboard creation
- Google Sheets integration, automated alerts
- Expected ROI: Real-time visibility, accurate forecasts

All tutorials include prerequisites, step-by-step instructions, and expected ROI. Link above for full details.
